Medicos Connect

$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL

Editor
Editor
mc
Editor
$(CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION)
Medicos Connect
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your bluetooth.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your bluetooth.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your bluetooth peripheral.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your calender.

$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your camera.So you can take an instant photo or make an instant video to upload to your Profile and/or Activity screen(s).Your data is secured and will be uploaded to our server.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your contact.Your data is secured and will be uploaded to our server.

$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to access your documents folder. So you can select and attach a pre-saved document to upload to your Background check profile area..Your data is secured and will be uploaded to our server.
Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) access to your location to share where your photos, and memos with your family and friends are recorded.
Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) access to your location to share where your photos, and memos with your family and friends are recorded.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your microphone.So it can capture the surrounding sounds and your voice to the video being recorded.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your motion.

$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your photo gallery.So you can select and attach pre-taken Photo(s) and pre-recorded Video(s ) to upload to your Profile and/or Activity screen(s).Your data is secured and will be uploaded to our server.

$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your photo gallery.So you can select and attach pre-taken Photo(s) and pre-recorded Video(s ) to upload to your Profile and/or Activity screen(s).Your data is secured and will be uploaded to our server.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your siri.
$(PRODUCT_NAME) would like to use your speech.
LaunchScreen
